narrative:
Precinct Zanesville 2-B (precinct in Muskingum County) has 924 registered voters, with 74.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points.
